live_migration_support_notes: Live migration requires a policy-installed transaction-event/log adapter or proxy-observed Cypher writes; otherwise dump/load plus final pause.
initial_snapshot_or_seed: dump/load or full graph scan with schema/index metadata
delta_feed_or_change_capture: transaction event listener or transaction-log-derived adapter only when policy-installed; otherwise proxy-observed Cypher writes
proxy_method: Bolt/HTTP proxy with graph label/relationship/index readiness routing
alternate_or_fallback: snapshot plus final write pause when no supported event adapter exists
required_cutover_barrier: source write pause or event stream drained; constraints/indexes stable; graph diff/query compare clean
parser_worker_scope: parse donor migration commands/wire/API messages; classify route; render donor diagnostics; no execution/finality authority
sbup_role_a_scope: trusted Role A bridge/proxy/source connector after engine admission; normalizes source events to DonorLiveIngestEventRecord; invokes admitted SBLR/internal procedures only
engine_mga_rule: destination ScratchBird MGA owns target commit visibility rollback recovery cutover evidence; donor feed tokens are evidence only
proof_tests: project/tests donor regression original baseline emulation steady-state active live-migration proxy mirror crash-restart idempotent replay rollback cutover performance and support bundle proofs
